from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/health")
def health_check():
    try:
        result = db.execute("SELECT 1").fetchone()
        db_ok = result is not None
    except Exception:
        db_ok = False
    return jsonify({"status": "healthy" if db_ok else "unhealthy"})

@app.route("/ready")
def readiness():
    checks = {}
    try:
        result = db.execute("SELECT 1").fetchone()
        checks["db"] = result is not None
    except Exception:
        checks["db"] = False
    return jsonify({"ready": all(checks.values()), "checks": checks})
